test.create_query: CREATE TABLE array_distance_const_exact_chunks ( w_f32_16 Array(Float32), w_f64_8 Array(Float64), w_bf16_32 Array(BFloat16) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO array_distance_const_exact_chunks SELECT arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(((number * 3 + i) % 251) + 1), range(16)) AS w_f32_16, arrayMap(i -> toFloat64(((number * 5 + i) % 251) + 1), range(8)) AS w_f64_8, arrayMap(i -> toBFloat16(((number * 7 + i) % 251) + 1), range(32)) AS w_bf16_32 FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(i + 1), range(16)) AS a SELECT sum(L2Distance(a, w_f32_16)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(i + 1), range(16)) AS a SELECT sum(cosineDistance(a, w_f32_16)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat64(i + 1), range(8)) AS a SELECT sum(L2Distance(a, w_f64_8)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat64(i + 1), range(8)) AS a SELECT sum(cosineDistance(a, w_f64_8)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
WITH arrayMap(i -> toBFloat16(i + 1), range(32)) AS a SELECT sum(L2Distance(a, w_bf16_32)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
WITH arrayMap(i -> toBFloat16(i + 1), range(32)) AS a SELECT sum(cosineDistance(a, w_bf16_32)) FROM array_distance_const_exact_chunks
